name: Definium Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview We are a late-stage clinical biopharmaceutical company developing novel product candidates to treat brain health disorders. Our mission is to forge a new era of psychiatry by applying scientific rigor to psychedelics, with the goal of developing accessible treatments that unlock healing at scale.
